headline: Verizon targets wireless customers with new simpler plans, drops some fees
summary: Verizon is aiming to attract customers by offering simpler plans, dropping activation and upgrade fees and unveiling a ‚ÄĆnew loyalty program offering discounts and perks.  The U.S. company is aggressively ‚ÄĆcompeting with AT&T and T-Mobile in the saturated U.S. telecoms market, where network providers have extended device ‚Äčsubsidies, added plan discounts and increased network infrastructure spending.  Verizon said its new program will offer customers 3% back on bills from July that can be used toward new phones or at consumer brands like Sephora, Hilton, Marriott and Starbucks.

headline: AT&T names Jennifer Biry as CFO from 2027, Desroches to retire
summary: Telecom provider AT&T said on Tuesday Pascal ‚ÄĆDesroches will retire as CFO ‚ÄĆat the end of 2026 and that ‚ÄčJennifer Biry would succeed him. Biry was appointed AT&T's deputy CFO on Monday.
